query: SELECT r.id AS repo_id, s.id AS schedule_id, a.hostname, r.name AS target_name, (SELECT br.status FROM backup_reports br WHERE br.schedule_id = s.id AND br.agent_id = a.id ORDER BY br.started_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_status, (SELECT br.finished_at FROM backup_reports br WHERE br.schedule_id = s.id AND br.agent_id = a.id ORDER BY br.started_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_backup_at, (SELECT br.error_message FROM backup_reports br WHERE br.schedule_id = s.id AND br.agent_id = a.id ORDER BY br.started_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_error_message, s.cron_expression, s.enabled AS schedule_enabled FROM schedules s JOIN schedule_targets st ON st.schedule_id = s.id JOIN agents a ON a.id = st.agent_id JOIN repos r ON r.id = s.repo_id WHERE a.is_hidden = false ORDER BY a.hostname, r.name
